display_name: the Ana Faustina · at anchor · 1873 forever

W.label: the sea beyond the rail · you can't see the moon reflected · the moon isn't there

#.label: the ship's rail · warm to the touch despite the water

M.label: the mainmast · older than any tree Sam has ever touched

s.label: a canvas sail, unfurled but still · no wind reaches this ship anymore

l.label: a hung lantern · warm · the light does not flicker

b.label: a lashed barrel · cochineal dye, undelivered · Porto to Astoria, 1873

t.label: the captain's cabin · door slightly ajar · someone is inside

C.label: the captain of the Ana Faustina · 5'4', greying, wearing a coat that has not been dry since March 1873

p.label: back down the rope ladder · into your canoe · back to shore

notes: The Ana Faustina at anchor · 1873 forever.  A Portuguese brig, ghost-inhabited but not hostile.  Three masts (each with a still sail), lashed barrels of cochineal dye (undelivered · Porto to Astoria, 1873), hung lanterns whose light does not flicker.  The captain's cabin at the aft, door ajar.  Inside · the captain of the Ana Faustina, 5'4', greying, wearing a coat that has not been dry since March 1873.  Ready to receive Sam.
